mapper.update:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gcp_billing_raw ( id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT 'PK' ,created DATETIME NULL COMMENT '수집 시각'
,billing_account_id VARCHAR(255) NULL COMMENT '청구 계정 ID' ,cost DOUBLE NULL COMMENT '발생 비용' ,cost_type VARCHAR(50) NULL COMMENT '비용 타입 (regular, tax, adjustment, rounding_error)' ,currency VARCHAR(10) NULL COMMENT '통화 코드 (KRW, USD)' ,currency_conversion_rate DOUBLE NULL COMMENT '환율' ,export_time DATETIME NULL COMMENT '데이터 추출 시각'
,invoice_month VARCHAR(6) NULL COMMENT '청구월 (YYYYMM)'
,service_id VARCHAR(255) NULL COMMENT '서비스 고유 ID' ,service_description VARCHAR(255) NULL COMMENT '서비스 명칭'
,sku_id VARCHAR(255) NULL COMMENT 'SKU 고유 ID' ,sku_description VARCHAR(512) NULL COMMENT 'SKU 상세 명칭'
,project_id VARCHAR(255) NULL COMMENT '프로젝트 ID' ,project_number VARCHAR(255) NULL COMMENT '프로젝트 번호' ,project_name VARCHAR(255) NULL COMMENT '프로젝트 명칭' ,project_ancestry_numbers VARCHAR(512) NULL COMMENT '상위 조직 경로'
,location VARCHAR(255) NULL COMMENT '상세 위치' ,location_country VARCHAR(10) NULL COMMENT '국가 코드' ,location_region VARCHAR(255) NULL COMMENT '리전' ,location_zone VARCHAR(255) NULL COMMENT '존'
,usage_start_time DATETIME NULL COMMENT '사용 시작 시각' ,usage_end_time DATETIME NULL COMMENT '사용 종료 시각' ,usage_amount DOUBLE NULL COMMENT '사용량' ,usage_unit VARCHAR(50) NULL COMMENT '사용량 단위' ,usage_amount_in_pricing_units DOUBLE NULL COMMENT '과금 단위 기준 수량' ,usage_pricing_unit VARCHAR(50) NULL COMMENT '과금 단위'
,adjustment_info_id VARCHAR(255) NULL COMMENT '조정 ID' ,adjustment_info_description VARCHAR(512) NULL COMMENT '조정 설명' ,adjustment_info_mode VARCHAR(50) NULL COMMENT '조정 모드' ,adjustment_info_type VARCHAR(50) NULL COMMENT '조정 타입'
,labels TEXT NULL COMMENT '라벨 (JSON)' ,system_labels TEXT NULL COMMENT '시스템 라벨 (JSON)' ,tags TEXT NULL COMMENT '태그 (JSON)'
-- labels(sys.*) 추출 → servicegroup_meta 매핑용 식별자 (컬럼명 servicegroup_meta와 정렬) ,csp_instanceid VARCHAR(200) NULL COMMENT 'labels.sys_cspresourceid (servicegroup_meta.csp_instanceid 조인키)' ,vm_id VARCHAR(100) NULL COMMENT 'labels.sys_id' ,mci_id VARCHAR(100) NULL COMMENT 'labels.sys_infraid' ,service_cd VARCHAR(100) NULL COMMENT 'labels.sys_namespace (ns_id)'
,INDEX idx_billing_date (billing_account_id, invoice_month) ,INDEX idx_project_date (project_id, usage_start_time) ,INDEX idx_service (service_description, usage_start_time) ,INDEX idx_csp_instanceid (csp_instanceid)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='GCP 빌링 원본 데이터'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO monthly_summation (`year_month`, project_cd, csp, total_cost, workspace_cd) SELECT raw.invoice_month ,COALESCE(meta.service_cd, raw.service_cd, 'undefined') ,'GCP' ,CAST(SUM(raw.cost) / ${krwPerUsd} AS CHAR) ,COALESCE(meta.service_cd, raw.service_cd, 'undefined') FROM gcp_billing_raw raw LEFT JOIN servicegroup_meta meta ON meta.csp_type = 'GCP' AND meta.csp_instanceid COLLATE utf8mb4_uca1400_ai_ci = raw.csp_instanceid WHERE raw.invoice_month = #{invoiceMonth} GROUP BY raw.invoice_month, COALESCE(meta.service_cd, raw.service_cd, 'undefined') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_cost = VALUES(total_cost) ,workspace_cd = VALUES(workspace_cd)
mapper.select: SELECT acm.csp_instanceid AS vmId ,acm.csp_account AS billingAccountId ,AVG(acm.metric_amount) AS yesterdayAvgCpu ,DATE(acm.collect_dt) AS yesterdayDate ,COALESCE(meta.service_cd, acm.csp_instanceid) AS projectCd ,meta.workspace_cd AS workspaceCd FROM asset_compute_metric acm LEFT JOIN servicegroup_meta meta ON meta.csp_type = 'GCP' AND meta.csp_instanceid COLLATE utf8mb4_uca1400_ai_ci = acm.csp_instanceid WHERE acm.csp_type = 'GCP' AND acm.metric_type = 'cpu' AND DATE(acm.collect_dt) = DATE(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)) GROUP BY acm.csp_instanceid, acm.csp_account, DATE(acm.collect_dt), meta.service_cd, meta.workspace_cd
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO unused_daily_mart ( create_dt ,csp_type ,resource_id ,collect_dt ,metric_type ,metric_avg_amount ) VALUES ( NOW() ,'GCP' ,#{vmId} ,#{yesterdayDate} ,'cpu' ,#{yesterdayAvgCpu} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE create_dt = NOW() ,metric_avg_amount = VALUES(metric_avg_amount)
mapper.select: SELECT AVG(metric_avg_amount) AS avgCpu14Days ,MAX(metric_avg_amount) AS maxCpu14Days ,COUNT(DISTINCT collect_dt) AS dayCount FROM unused_daily_mart WHERE csp_type = 'GCP' AND resource_id = #{vmId} AND metric_type = 'cpu' AND collect_dt >= DATE(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY)) AND collect_dt <= DATE(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO unused_batch_rst ( create_dt ,csp_type ,csp_account ,csp_instanceid ,plan_type ) VALUES ( NOW() ,'GCP' ,#{billingAccountId} ,#{vmId} ,'Unused' ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE plan_type = 'Unused'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT udm.resource_id AS vmId ,AVG(udm.metric_avg_amount) AS avg4DaysCpu ,MAX(udm.metric_avg_amount) AS max4DaysCpu ,COUNT(DISTINCT udm.collect_dt) AS dayCount ,COALESCE(meta.service_cd, udm.resource_id) AS projectCd ,meta.workspace_cd AS workspaceCd ,meta.csp_account AS billingAccountId ,meta.vm_id AS tbbVmId ,meta.mci_id AS tbbMciId ,meta.service_cd AS tbbNsId ,CASE WHEN AVG(udm.metric_avg_amount) > 80 THEN 'Up' WHEN AVG(udm.metric_avg_amount) <= 10 AND MAX(udm.metric_avg_amount) <= 50 THEN 'Down' ELSE 'Modernize' END AS recommendType FROM unused_daily_mart udm LEFT JOIN servicegroup_meta meta ON meta.csp_type = 'GCP' AND meta.csp_instanceid COLLATE utf8mb4_uca1400_ai_ci = udm.resource_id WHERE udm.csp_type = 'GCP' AND udm.metric_type = 'cpu' AND udm.collect_dt >= DATE(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 4 DAY)) AND udm.collect_dt < CURDATE() GROUP BY udm.resource_id, meta.service_cd, meta.workspace_cd, meta.csp_account, meta.vm_id, meta.mci_id ) candidates WHERE recommendType IS NOT NULL AND dayCount >= 4
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM unused_batch_rst WHERE csp_type = 'GCP' AND csp_instanceid = #{vmId} AND DATE(create_dt) = CURDATE()

WITH gcp_costs AS ( SELECT COALESCE(meta.service_cd, raw.service_cd, raw.project_id) AS project_cd ,'GCP' AS csp_type ,SUM(raw.cost) AS total_cost ,MAX(raw.billing_account_id) AS account_id FROM gcp_billing_raw raw LEFT JOIN servicegroup_meta meta ON meta.csp_type = 'GCP' AND meta.csp_instanceid COLLATE utf8mb4_uca1400_ai_ci = raw.csp_instanceid WHERE raw.invoice_month = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y%m') GROUP BY COALESCE(meta.service_cd, raw.service_cd, raw.project_id) ) SELECT costs.project_cd AS projectCd ,costs.csp_type AS cspType ,costs.total_cost AS totalCost ,budget.budget AS budget ,budget.currency AS currency ,ROUND((costs.total_cost / budget.budget * 100), 2) AS usageRate ,costs.account_id AS accountId FROM gcp_costs costs INNER JOIN budget_monthly budget ON budget.project_cd COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci = costs.project_cd COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci AND budget.csp = 'GCP' AND budget.year = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND budget.month = MONTH(CURDATE()) WHERE budget.budget IS NOT NULL AND budget.budget > 0 AND (costs.total_cost / budget.budget * 100) >= 80 ORDER BY usageRate DESC
